intro.p: Given the magnitude and direction angle of a vector, find its horizontal and vertical components.

content.p: A vector has magnitude {{r}} and direction angle {{theta}}^\circ.

(a) Find the horizontal and vertical components of the vector.
(b) Write the vector as an ordered pair.
Round all answers to the nearest hundredth.

outtro.p: The horizontal component is {{x}} and the vertical component is {{y}}.
The vector written as an ordered pair is \langle {{x}}, {{y}} \rangle.
